title: Mace Mayhem (Anchorpoint)
description: The mace is now a giant anchor! (inspired by arsenal)
body:
# Anchorpoint

The mace isn't beefy enough for for how powerfull it is, so this pack changes that. With Anchorpoint installed, the mace will now resemble an enourmous anchor, (Heavily inspired by that of the arsenal mod). Even in your hand this weapon of mass destruction is two times as large as it was. See the gallery for images.

If you enjoy what I do, consider supporting me on Ko-fi! Every little bit means a lot https://ko-fi.com/limeimortal

Also: for anyone wanting a custom pack made for them; also send a dm to Lime_void on the Imortals Packs discord with your specific suggestion, your reason (if you have one) and a colour pallet if you want, a size, a name (optional) and what mod (or base minecraft) it should be for within.
